insight: the protocol effect survives a gold-free oracle: a docstring-derived property (no held-out tests in the gate) catches the gamed both-miss 3/3 and drives gold-free repair to real completion 2/3, closing the 'you used the real tests' objection. Bounded to the property-derivable subset (sound on 9/10); the compound sound-property-and-both-miss requirement limits N. An initial all-unsound run was a Django-settings harness artifact, caught and fixed
next_action: grow the evaluated set by decoupling property synthesis from both-miss construction (bank sound properties, then attack), and extend beyond format functions to raise the property-derivable yield
